title: rosa × schleicheri var. conica
intro: Rosa × schleicheri var. conica, also known as the Rosa Cymosa, is a variant of the Rosa × schleicheri plant, specifically a type of fragrant, flowering rose. The plant's medicinal properties include its high levels of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The Rosa × schleicheri var. conica has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, inflammation, and stress, due to its anti-inflammatory and adaptogenic properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
